languages.text: "Более... вместить... воображение..." {n}Переводчик издает несколько бинарных гудков, не справившись со сложным построением фразы.{/n} "Не явил... свое могущество примитивам... лишь бесконечные страдания для одного. Финал... ничтожного разума".

"More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."
languages.original_text: "Более... вместить... воображение..." {n}Переводчик издает несколько бинарных гудков, не справившись со сложным построением фразы.{/n} "Не явил... свое могущество примитивам... лишь бесконечные страдания для одного. Финал... ничтожного разума".

"More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... his might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

"More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... his might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

languages.text: “超出……想象……所能……企及……”{n}阐释器发出几声二进制蜂鸣，显然无法处理如此复杂的句式。{/n}“未向……原始生物……展露……其威能……仅将无尽苦难赐予其中一人。这就是卑贱智识的……终局。”
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: “超出……想象……所能……企及……”{n}阐释器发出几声二进制蜂鸣，显然无法处理如此复杂的句式。{/n}“未向……原始生物……展露……其威能……仅将无尽苦难赐予其中一人。这就是卑贱智识的……终局。”

languages.text: «Más del que... el intelecto... puede imaginar». {n}El Dilucidador, incapaz de procesar la complejidad de la frase, emite varios pitidos binarios.{/n} «Ocultó... su poder a los primitivos... sufrimiento eterno para uno. El fin para... para un intelecto inferior».
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: «Más del que... el intelecto... puede imaginar». {n}El Dilucidador, incapaz de procesar la complejidad de la frase, emite varios pitidos binarios.{/n} «Ocultó... su poder a los primitivos... sufrimiento eterno para uno. El fin para... para un intelecto inferior».

languages.text: « Dépasse... votre imagination... limitée. » {n}L'élucidateur émet une série de bips binhaires, déboussolé par la construction complexe de la phrase.{/n} « N'a jamais révélé... sa force aux primitifs... souffrance éternelle à l'un d'eux. Une fin pour... un intellect inférieur. »
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: « Dépasse... votre imagination... limitée. » {n}L'élucidateur émet une série de bips binhaires, déboussolé par la construction complexe de la phrase.{/n} « N'a jamais révélé... sa force aux primitifs... souffrance éternelle à l'un d'eux. Une fin pour... un intellect inférieur. »

languages.text: "Hayal gücünün... Kapsayabileceğinden... Daha fazlası." {n}Aydınlatıcı, cümlenin karmaşık yapısıyla baş edemeyerek birkaç ikilidil bip sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "Kudretini... İlkellere açıklamadı... Birine sonsuz acı bahşetti. Adi bir zekânın... Sonu."
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Hayal gücünün... Kapsayabileceğinden... Daha fazlası." {n}Aydınlatıcı, cümlenin karmaşık yapısıyla baş edemeyerek birkaç ikilidil bip sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "Kudretini... İlkellere açıklamadı... Birine sonsuz acı bahşetti. Adi bir zekânın... Sonu."

languages.text: "Mehr als ... Vorstellung ... erfasst." {n}Der Elucidator stößt mehrere binhärische Töne aus, als er an der komplexen Konstruktion der Worte scheitert.{/n} "Hat seine Macht ... den Primitiven nicht offenbart .... nur endloses Leid für einen. Das Ende eines ... eines niederen Verstandes."
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... its might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Mehr als ... Vorstellung ... erfasst." {n}Der Elucidator stößt mehrere binhärische Töne aus, als er an der komplexen Konstruktion der Worte scheitert.{/n} "Hat seine Macht ... den Primitiven nicht offenbart .... nur endloses Leid für einen. Das Ende eines ... eines niederen Verstandes."

languages.text: 「想像を超える... 包み込む」{n}エリュシレーターは、複雑な文構造にうまく対応できず、いくつかの二音音符を鳴らした。{/n}「彼の力は... 未開の人々に... 決して示されなかった... 彼の苦しみは... 終わりなきものだった... 愚かな知性の終わり」
languages.original_text: "More than... imagination... encompass" {n}The Elucidator emits several binharic beeps, having failed to cope with the complex construction of the phrase.{/n} "Did not reveal... his might to the primitives.... only endless suffering for one. The end of... of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: 「想像を超える... 包み込む」{n}エリュシレーターは、複雑な文構造にうまく対応できず、いくつかの二音音符を鳴らした。「彼の力は... 未開の人々に... 決して示されなかった... 彼の苦しみは... 終わりなきものだった... 愚かな知性の終わり」
